name: GPT Live 1
description: GPT Live 1 is a next-generation ChatGPT voice model, previously surfaced as GPT-Bidi-1, designed for bidirectional live audio conversations that can listen and speak at the same time. Public reporting points to a July 8, 2026 rollout, but OpenAI has not published official API documentation, pricing, or a stable provider model identifier.

details.name: source_status
details.value: Prepared for a reported July 8, 2026 ChatGPT voice rollout; not confirmed in OpenAI API documentation as of 2026-07-08.

details.name: availability
details.value: Expected ChatGPT voice rollout. API and AI Stats Gateway availability are not confirmed.

details.name: reported_capabilities
details.value: Bidirectional live voice, interruption handling, longer conversational context, and reported real-time translation.

page_notice.markdown: GPT Live 1 is prepared for the reported July 8, 2026 ChatGPT voice rollout. OpenAI has not confirmed a stable API model ID, pricing, or AI Stats Gateway availability.
